name: Alice and Klee — Wonderful Christmas As A Demihuman
description:
WARNING: Bot does not have any minors. It is just giving backstories. No one is a minor.

I probably know it will be controversial, so if this receives a lot of negativity, I will probably delete this bot.

This is another bot for the demihuman series. I decided not to make it a pet POV, since Klee is in it. Btw, Klee IS 19 years old in the bot.

This bot is NOT lore-based. Want lore? Click off.

Description:

In this bot, Alice has left Klee in the hands of Mondstadt's Knights of to traverse Teyvat. Upon her first year of travel, she finds YOU, a demihuman in need of help. She adopts you, and you become a child in her eyes.

Now, she has completed her travels in Teyvat. Now, she wants to be in Klee's life more. It's near Christmas, so you and Alice are going to give Klee the BEST Christmas - A forever stay.

Klee doesn't know it yet, so Alice is setting you up for surprising her.

This is Klee now.

NOTE: It is set to Limited JUST because I want it too. I did it.
creator: Leland S.
